content: Best JS IMU sensor fusion options: (1) ahrs npm package (psiphi75/ahrs) - implements Madgwick and Mahony algorithms, configurable beta/kp/ki params, browser-compatible, works with DeviceOrientation API. (2) madgwick.js (ZiCog) - direct port of original X-IO C implementation. Recommendation: ahrs package for its dual algorithm support and npm availability. Madgwick: better for magnetometer-equipped devices. Mahony: slightly faster, lower CPU.
